title: Internal corpus citation is traceable only when the feature flag opts in
content: A finding whose sole citation is an internal/document source carrying quoted evidence in note is traceable ONLY when features.internalCitations is enabled; under the strict default (flag absent/false) it must be rejected as untraceable.

citations.title: Imported legacy corpus memo, section 3
citations.note: "Fan-out before synthesis improved coverage in the 2024 internal evaluation."

verification.verdict_basis: Internal evaluation corroborated the claim; no disconfirming evidence found.
